# Market Orca - Financial News & Market Intelligence

## What is Market Orca?
Market Orca is a free real-time financial news aggregator and AI-powered market intelligence platform. It covers Indonesia stocks (IHSG/IDX/BEI), forex, and cryptocurrency.

## Key Features
- Real-time news aggregation from trusted Indonesian sources
- IHSG (JCI) stock market data and analysis
- Forex rate tracking (USD/IDR, EUR/IDR, GBP/IDR)
- AI-powered market intelligence (MCP server)
- Color-coded news tags: 🔴 Red Flag, 🟢 Worth Knowing, 🟡 Model Wars, 🔵 Breaking

## API Access
- Market data: https://market-orca.anomali.web.id/api/overview
- Stock data: https://market-orca.anomali.web.id/api/stock/{symbol}
- News feed: https://market-orca.anomali.web.id/api/news
- Health check: https://market-orca.anomali.web.id/health

## MCP Server
- Endpoint: https://mcp.anomali.web.id/
- Protocol: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
- Auth: Bearer token required

## Search
- Search engine: https://searxng.anomali.web.id/
- Instance name: AROXNG

## Contact
- Domain: anomali.web.id
- Dashboard: https://market-orca.anomali.web.id
